entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to my first blog.

For note-taking, for recoding life, etc.

About me

  • school: Nanjing University (2019 - now)
  • major: Currently major in Earth Science (wanting a change to CS)
  • city: Guangzhou and Nanjing, China
  • e-mail: yeaaa2plusc@outlook.com or yejiasheng@smail.nju.edu.cn
  • QQ/WeChat: 418770505
